title: Determine if Two Strings Are Close
titleCn: 确定两个字符串是否接近

testcases.input: word1 = "abc", word2 = "bca" Output: true Explanation: You can attain word2 from word1 in 2 operations. Apply Operation 1: "abc" -> "acb" Apply Operation 1: "acb" -> "bca"
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: You can attain word2 from word1 in 2 operations. Apply Operation 1: "abc" -> "acb" Apply Operation 1: "acb" -> "bca

testcases.input: word1 = "a", word2 = "aa" Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to attain word2 from word1, or vice versa, in any number of operations.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to attain word2 from word1, or vice versa, in any number of operations.

testcases.input: word1 = "cabbba", word2 = "abbccc" Output: true Explanation: You can attain word2 from word1 in 3 operations. Apply Operation 1: "cabbba" -> "caabbb" Apply Operation 2: "caabbb" -> "baaccc" Apply Operation 2: "baaccc" -> "abbccc"
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: You can attain word2 from word1 in 3 operations. Apply Operation 1: "cabbba" -> "caabbb" Apply Operation 2: "caabbb" -> "baaccc" Apply Operation 2: "baaccc" -> "abbccc
